name: weather-app-vibecoded
description: A simple terminal app to know the weather in a concrete city

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && bun build index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/weather-app-vibecoded-linux-x64 && bun build index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/weather-app-vibecoded-windows-x64.exe && bun build index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/weather-app-vibecoded-darwin-x64
